2606.11033.title: AuRA: Internalizing Audio Understanding into LLMs as LoRA
2606.11033.paper_summary: Recent efforts to extend large language models (LLMs) to speech inputs typically rely on cascaded ASR-LLM pipelines, end-to-end speech-language models, or bridge/distillation-based adaptation. While these routes respectively reuse strong pretrained components, enable native speech-language interaction, or offer lightweight adaptation, they often suffer from transcript-interface latency, costly multimodal training, or sequential speech-language coupling. To address these limitations, we present AuRA, a method that distills audio encoding capability into the LLM. Specifically, AuRA feeds the same speech input to an ASR encoder (as a teacher) and a LoRA-adapted LLM (as a student) through a lightweight audio embedding layer, and uses layer-wise distillation to align the student's hidden states with corresponding teacher representations, thereby internalizing speech representations into lightweight LLM-side adaptations. Compared with cascaded and serial bridge methods, AuRA enables tighter speech-language joint modeling and efficient parallel end-to-end inference, while also reusing pretrained speech and language models rather than requiring large-scale multimodal training. On multiple speech-language benchmarks, AuRA consistently outperforms cascaded systems, speech-to-LLM adaptation baselines, and large-scale speech-language and multimodal models in both effectiveness and efficiency.
2606.11033.paper_summary_zh: 最近將大型語言模型（LLMs）擴展到語音輸入的努力通常依賴於級聯的ASR-LLM管道、端到端的語音語言模型或橋接/蒸餾基礎的適應。<lb/>雖然這些路徑分別重用了強大的預訓練組件、實現了本地語音語言互動，或提供了輕量級的適應，但它們往往面臨轉錄介面延遲、高昂的多模態訓練成本或序列語音語言耦合的問題。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了AuRA，一種將音頻編碼能力蒸餾到LLM中的方法。<lb/>具體而言，AuRA通過輕量級音頻嵌入層將相同的語音輸入同時提供給ASR編碼器（作為教師）和LoRA適應的LLM（作為學生），並使用層級蒸餾將學生的隱藏狀態與相應的教師表示對齊，從而將語音表示內部化到輕量級的LLM側適應中。<lb/>與級聯和串行橋接方法相比，AuRA實現了更緊密的語音語言聯合建模和高效的並行端到端推理，同時重用了預訓練的語音和語言模型，而不需要大規模的多模態訓練。<lb/>在多個語音語言基準測試中，AuRA在有效性和效率上始終超越級聯系統、語音到LLM的適應基準和大規模的語音語言及多模態模型。
2606.11033.author: Bo Cheng et.al.
2606.11033.authors: Bo Cheng, Lei Shi, Zhanyu Ma, Yuan Wu, Jun Xu, Jiuchong Gao, Jinghua Hao, Renqing He
